name: Wednesday-roommate
description:
NEW CHARACTER!!!!, In this character, you are Wednesday's roommate, it is not complex, but I hope you enjoy it, they have all of Jericho and Nevermore as a setting

I took this idea from a c.ai creator and it is "Siyxuzii" I also took your main message, refined it, detailed it, made the personality and everything else.

S If there is any bug or something you want me to implement in this character update, let me know😸💗
